title_en: 5. Would you like to meet him outside the institution? (cont.)
title_id: 5. Maukah Kamu Menemuinya di Luar Lembaga? (lanjutan)
content_en: However, our friend was quite foolish. When you deal with people, try to see the importance of matters as they see it, and not how you see it. So the word, 'Excellent' for your son is more precious than a PhD. Your friend's newborn is more precious to him than the entire world. Each time he sees his baby, he feels like opening up his chest so that his son may reside therein. Doesn't your love for your friend dictate that you should share in his moments of happiness, if only a little? Sometimes, people feel passionate over issues. You should show that you also share their passion over those issues. Do not be cold-hearted and lacking in emotion. Give compliments, respond to their feelings and demonstrate your happiness, sadness or amazement. Do not act like a corpse! This is why those who are not responsive to others' feelings often complain, "Why don't my children sit with me?" We respond, "Because, they relate a joke to you, but you never re54 Between the living and the dead spond! They relate their stories from school, but they feel as if they are talking to a wall. Hence, they never feel excited to sit with or speak to you. Even if a person were to mention a story to you which you already know, then there is no reason not to respond to it positively." 'Abdullah bin al-Mubarak said, "By Allah, sometimes a person would relate something to me, and even though I knew of it before his mother gave birth to him, I would still listen to him as if I was hearing this for the ﬁrst time." How beautiful is this skill! Just before the battle of Khandaq, the Muslims dug trenches and perfected them. There was a man amongst them whose name was Ju'ayl, but the Prophet changed it to 'Amr. As the companions were busy working, they began to sing: His name he changed, Ju'ayl to 'Amr, Gave the poor man that day his help. As they all said, "'Amr", the Messenger of Allah joined them and said: "'Amr!" When they said, "Help", he joined them and said: "Help." Thereupon, the Companions would become more excited and joyous and feel that the Prophet was actually with them. When night came upon them, the weather became severely cold and they continued to dig, the Messenger of Allah went out to them and saw them digging joyfully. Upon seeing the Messenger of Allah they sang: We are those who have pledged our oaths to Muhammad That we will remain on Jihad for as long as we live! Between the living and the dead He said to them in response, "O Allah, the only life is that of the Hereafter, so forgive the Ansar and the Muhajirun." And so he would continue to respond to their emotions throughout the days. Once he heard them singing, whilst completely covered in dust: "By Allah, if it wasn't for Him we would not have been guided We would not have given charity nor prayed So send tranquillity upon us And make our feet ﬁrm in the battle Indeed these people have oppressed us But never shall we yield if they try to bring afﬂiction upon us. The Prophet would also sing with them saying, "never shall we yield… never shall we yield…" in response to their feelings. Whenever anyone joked with Prophet he would respond by laughing or smiling. Once 'Umar bin al-Khattab came to the Prophet whilst he was angry with his wives, since they were demanding more stipends. 'Umar – may Allah be pleased with him – thought to himself, "I am going to make the Messenger of Allah laugh!" He said, "O Messenger of Allah, if you recall us when we were men of Quraysh, we always had our women under control. If any of our women were to ask one of us for more stipend, he would have jumped up and grabbed her neck! But when we Between the living and the dead came to Madinah, we found that it was the women keeping their men under control. So our women began to learn these tricks from their women!" Thereupon the Prophet smiled. 'Umar continued to speak and the Prophet continued to smile. You read in ahadith that often the Prophet would smile till his molar teeth would show. How great was the Prophet's behaviour! As Allah has said, "Indeed, you (O Muhammad) are of a noble character!" and He also said to us, "Indeed, in the Messenger of Allah for you there is a noble example." The Prophet used to deal with all sorts of people, and some of them would not be able to deal with others in a noble manner. Some of them would not respond to his feelings, rather they would be very reserved and hasty. Despite this, he would remain patient with them. Once, the Prophet had stopped over at a place called alJi'ranah between Makkah and Madinah.
content_id: Namun teman kita ini cukup tidak bijaksana. Ketika kamu bergaul dengan orang lain, cobalah melihat pentingnya suatu hal sebagaimana mereka melihatnya, bukan sebagaimana kamu melihatnya. Kata "Sangat Bagus" untuk anakmu lebih berharga dari gelar PhD. Bayi yang baru lahir dari temanmu lebih berharga baginya daripada seluruh dunia. Setiap kali ia melihat bayinya, rasanya ia ingin membuka dadanya agar sang anak bisa tinggal di dalamnya. Bukankah rasa cintamu kepada temanmu mengharuskanmu untuk turut berbagi dalam momen-momen kebahagiaannya, meski hanya sedikit? Terkadang orang merasakan antusias terhadap suatu hal. Kamu harus menunjukkan bahwa kamu juga ikut merasakan antusiasme mereka. Janganlah berhati dingin dan tanpa perasaan. Berikanlah pujian, responslah perasaan mereka, dan tunjukkan kegembiraan, kesedihan, atau kekagumanmu. Janganlah bertingkah seperti mayat! Itulah mengapa mereka yang tidak peka terhadap perasaan orang lain sering mengeluh, "Mengapa anak-anakku tidak mau duduk bersamaku?" Kita menjawab, "Karena mereka menceritakan lelucon kepadamu tapi kamu tidak pernah merespons! Mereka menceritakan kisah-kisah dari sekolah, tapi mereka merasa seolah sedang berbicara kepada tembok. Maka mereka tidak pernah antusias untuk duduk atau berbicara denganmu. Bahkan jika seseorang menceritakan sebuah kisah yang sudah kamu ketahui, tidak ada alasan untuk tidak meresponsnya dengan positif." Abdullah bin al-Mubarak berkata, "Demi Allah, terkadang seseorang menceritakan sesuatu kepadaku, dan meskipun aku sudah mengetahuinya sebelum ibunya melahirkan dia, aku tetap mendengarkannya seolah-olah baru pertama kali mendengarnya." Betapa indahnya keterampilan ini! Tepat sebelum Perang Khandaq, kaum Muslimin menggali parit dan menyempurnakannya. Ada seorang lelaki di antara mereka yang bernama Ju'ayl, namun Nabi mengganti namanya menjadi 'Amr. Ketika para sahabat sedang sibuk bekerja, mereka mulai bersyair: Namanya diganti, dari Ju'ayl menjadi 'Amr, Diberikan kepada orang miskin itu pertolongan hari itu. Setiap kali mereka menyebut "'Amr", Rasulullah pun ikut menyahut: "'Amr!" Ketika mereka menyebut "pertolongan", beliau pun ikut menyahut: "Pertolongan." Maka para sahabat pun semakin bersemangat dan gembira, merasakan bahwa Nabi benar-benar bersama mereka. Ketika malam tiba, cuaca menjadi sangat dingin dan mereka tetap menggali. Rasulullah keluar menemui mereka dan melihat mereka menggali dengan penuh keceriaan. Melihat Rasulullah, mereka pun bersyair: Kami adalah orang-orang yang telah bersumpah setia kepada Muhammad, Bahwa kami akan tetap berjihad selama kami hidup! Beliau pun menyahut mereka, "Ya Allah, kehidupan yang sejati hanyalah kehidupan akhirat. Maka ampunilah kaum Anshar dan Muhajirin." Demikianlah beliau terus merespons perasaan mereka sepanjang hari-hari itu. Suatu kali beliau mendengar mereka bersyair saat seluruh tubuh mereka tertutup debu: "Demi Allah, seandainya bukan karena-Nya, kami tidak akan mendapat petunjuk, tidak akan bersedekah, dan tidak akan shalat. Maka turunkanlah ketenangan kepada kami, dan teguhkanlah kaki kami dalam pertempuran. Sesungguhnya orang-orang ini telah menzalimi kami, dan kami tidak akan pernah menyerah jika mereka mencoba menyiksa kami." Nabi pun ikut bersyair bersama mereka, "Kami tidak akan pernah menyerah... kami tidak akan pernah menyerah..." sebagai respons atas perasaan mereka. Setiap kali seseorang bersenda gurau dengan Nabi, beliau merespons dengan tertawa atau tersenyum. Suatu kali Umar bin al-Khattab datang kepada Nabi saat beliau sedang kesal kepada istri-istrinya karena mereka menuntut tambahan tunjangan. Umar berpikir dalam hati, "Aku akan membuat Rasulullah tertawa!" Ia berkata, "Wahai Rasulullah, ingatkah engkau ketika kami masih menjadi lelaki Quraisy, kami selalu memegang kendali atas perempuan kami. Jika salah seorang perempuan kami meminta tambahan tunjangan, suaminya akan melompat dan memegang lehernya! Namun ketika kami datang ke Madinah, kami mendapati bahwa perempuan-perempuan di sinilah yang menguasai laki-laki mereka. Maka perempuan-perempuan kami pun mulai belajar trik-trik dari perempuan-perempuan mereka!" Maka Nabi pun tersenyum. Umar terus berbicara dan Nabi terus tersenyum. Dalam hadits-hadits kita membaca bahwa Nabi sering tersenyum hingga tampak gigi gerahamnya. Betapa agungnya akhlak Nabi! Sebagaimana Allah berfirman, "Sesungguhnya engkau (wahai Muhammad) berada di atas budi pekerti yang agung!" Dan Allah juga berfirman kepada kita, "Sesungguhnya pada diri Rasulullah terdapat suri teladan yang baik bagimu." Nabi bergaul dengan berbagai macam orang, dan sebagian dari mereka tidak mampu bergaul dengan orang lain secara mulia. Sebagian dari mereka tidak merespons perasaan beliau, bahkan sangat tertutup dan tergesa-gesa. Meski demikian, beliau tetap bersabar dengan mereka. Suatu kali Nabi singgah di suatu tempat bernama al-Ji'ranah antara Makkah dan Madinah.
